Interface ILasHeaderInfo2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseExtensions
Assembly
ESRI.Server.GeoDatabaseExtensions.dll

Provides access to the header information of LAS files.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("3B88519F-5972-45E4-9E49-D7293F84A96F")]
public interface ILasHeaderInfo2 : ILasHeaderInfo
